package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	redis "github.com/redis/go-redis/v9"
)

// scenario for redis_large_value_without_compression: `rdb.Set(ctx, key, largePayload, ...)` where `largePayload` is the result of `json.Marshal` on a large struct or slice, without visible compression
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: info.
func scenario426Positive(ctx context.Context, client *redis.Client, key string) error {
	if err := client.Get(ctx, key).Err(); err != nil {
		return err
	}
	return client.Set(ctx, key, "value", 0).Err()
}
